ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B9 Zealot rocket barrel
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: Standard B9 Zealot barrel for 9x21mm mini airburst rockets. Placeholder balance.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B9 Zealot reinforced barrel
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A rigid, thermally reinforced barrel assembly for the B9. Its heavier structure reduces dispersion and recoil while carrying heat away from sustained automatic fire, but the added forward mass makes the weapon slower to shoulder and redirect.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B9 Zealot standard grip
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: The B9's standard pistol grip, providing predictable control without altering the weapon's original handling.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B9 Zealot ergonomic grip
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A contoured ergonomic grip with pronounced finger indexing. It improves leverage, presentation and target transitions across the B9's engagement envelope, at the cost of a small increase in weight.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B9 Zealot skeletonized grip
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A hollowed grip that removes every nonessential section of material. It makes the B9 faster to present, but sacrifices the rigid support needed for deliberate medium- and long-range fire.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: B9 Zealot compact stock
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: Compact stock for close assault. Placeholder balance.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: 9x21mm mini airburst rockets
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: 9x21mm mini airburst rockets for the B9 Zealot. Placeholder balance.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: 32-round 9x21mm rocket magazine
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: Combat Extended B9 Zealot magazine. Placeholder balance.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: 32-round 9x21mm flip magazine
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: Two opposed B9 Zealot magazines bound together for a faster flip reload. It keeps standard loaded capacity but reduces reload time. Placeholder balance.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: 75-round 9x21mm rocket drum
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A 75-round drum for sustained B9 automatic fire. Its compact helical feed more than doubles the standard magazine's capacity, but the loaded drum adds substantial weight and takes longer to lock into place.
